# .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/change_request.md

---
name: Change Request
about: Propose or modify a change with decision logging and clear acceptance criteria
title: "[CHANGE] <short title>"
labels: ["change-request"]
assignees: []
---

## Original request (preserve the initial ask)
> Capture the initial request as first understood.
> Avoid deleting or rewriting this section. If the plan changes, record it below.

## Context / Background
- Why now?
- Who is impacted?
- Links / references:

-

### Functional
-

- [ ] 
- [ ]

## Risks / Impact assessment
- User impact: None / Low / Medium / High
- Data impact: None / Schema / Migration / Query/perf / Permissions
- Security impact: None / Auth / PII / Secrets / External exposure
- Operational impact: None / Monitoring / Alerts / Backups / Runbook updates
- Rollback strategy:

## Proposed approach (initial)
- 

## Updates / Decision log (append-only; link to the comment that triggered the change)
> When discussion changes scope/requirements, add an entry here and link the comment or review.

- YYYY-MM-DD — Update summary (triggered by: <link>)
  - Decision:
  - Reasoning:
  - What changed (scope/requirements/AC):
  - Open questions / follow-ups:

## Design sign-off (optional; PR approval is the merge gate)
- Design reviewer(s): @<name-or-team>
  - Link to sign-off comment:
  - Notes/conditions:

- Implements:
- Release/deploy notes:
